app.name: Khanyisa Consulting
app.hero_subtitle: Professional business consulting for South African entrepreneurs — from registration to operations.

qualification.title: Where are you in your business journey?
qualification.subtitle: This helps us understand your needs and recommend the right package.
qualification.opt_startup_desc: I have an idea but no registered business yet.
qualification.opt_operating_desc: I have a running business but need support.
qualification.opt_systems_desc: My operations are messy and need structure.
qualification.opt_compliance_desc: I need registrations, tax, or legal help.
qualification.recommended_subtitle: Based on your business journey, here are our top picks.

packages.kickstart_desc: Get your business legally registered and ready to operate.
packages.sidehustle_desc: Full compliance package for your side business — registration, tax, banking, and bookkeeping.
packages.systems_desc: Streamline your operations with proper workflows and automation.
packages.bookkeeping_desc: Set up your financial tracking and reporting systems.
packages.ceo_desc: Ongoing monthly consulting, systems management, and strategic guidance.
packages.standalone_desc: Company registration only — get your business legally registered with CIPC.
packages.orgreset_desc: Full operations overhaul — workflows, systems, and automation from scratch.
